_schema.handle: internal slug (lowercase, may differ from Farcaster username)
_schema.fid: Farcaster FID number - PRIMARY identity. If set, HAATZ avatar lookup uses bulk?fids=X (always reliable). If null, falls back to parsing farcaster_url for username.
_schema.name: Display name
_schema.roles: Array of: organizer | mentor | workshop_lead | core_builder | sponsor | partner | builder
_schema.headline: One-line credential or position
_schema.expertise_label: Single-word label for card (e.g. ECOSYSTEM, MUSIC TECH, CONTRACTS, RETENTION)
_schema.session_count: for workshop_lead: how many sessions confirmed
_schema.session_topics: for workshop_lead: array of confirmed topics
_schema.what_they_offer: For mentor: what builders get pairing with them
_schema.best_fit_for: For mentor: what type of build is best fit

people.name: Zaal Panthaki
people.headline: Organizer + BetterCallZaal + The ZAO operations
people.bio: Engineer, builder, and connector in the web3/Farcaster/music ecosystem. Runs BetterCallZaal Strategies LLC, hosts COC Concertz, organizes ZABAL Gamez. BS Electrical Engineering, RIT 2022. Maine-based.
people.what_they_offer: Direct line into the ZAO ecosystem - intros, context, pattern matching against past builds, infra access.
people.best_fit_for: Builds that touch multiple ZAO surfaces (music + governance + agents + Farcaster). Generalists who need cross-domain connective tissue.

people.name: Tyler Stambaugh
people.headline: Founder, Magnetiq - workshop library platform
people.bio: Founder of Magnetiq, the workshop library + entry/onboarding platform hosting every ZABAL Gamez Season 1 session. Magnetiq is the host platform for the workshop month - native video, opt-in email capture, per-vendor watch analytics.
session_topics: Magnetiq - The Workshop Library Behind ZABAL Gamez

people.name: Thy Revolution
people.headline: Indie music + creator-tools workshop lead
people.bio: Workshop lead #002 - confirmed 2 sessions for June 2026 (topics TBD). Also known as Mickey or Rev (three names, same person). Years building independently outside the major-label system.

people.name: Hurric4n3Ike
people.headline: WaveWarZ founder - Solana music battle markets
people.bio: Built WaveWarZ on Solana - the artist prediction-market platform. Growing battle history + cumulative SOL volume (live numbers at wavewarz-intelligence.vercel.app). WaveWarZ is the underlying tech the August Finals will run on.

people.name: Sam
people.headline: WaveWarZ-Base co-builder
people.bio: Shipping the Base agentic version of WaveWarZ alongside Hurric4n3Ike. Two smart contracts on testnet, mainnet-bound for July. Full handle + surname pending confirmation.

people.name: Will T of Web3
people.headline: Building KFMEDIA℠
people.bio: Workshop lead for ZABAL Gamez Season 1, building KFMEDIA℠. Refer to him as Will T of Web3. KFMEDIA℠ community: @kingfishersmedia on Farcaster, @kmllcw3 on X.
session_topics: Building KFMEDIA℠ - what he is building, how he is doing it, and the lessons so far.

people.name: Jose Cabrera
people.headline: Independent musician - Digital Street Music
people.bio: Independent musician exploring Digital Street Music: live performance on the streets of the metaverse, in service of social impact and coordination. He learned English working in DAOs and built an independent, blockchain-agnostic practice, connecting roots to the decentralized social layer of the new internet and inviting other musicians and artists to do the same.
session_topics: Owning your music as an independent artist - releasing, owning your masters and your audience, and turning listeners into a community that pays you directly.
